reference: This sounds as though it could be a fungal infection. Fungal infections can burn and itch and may even crack, bleed, and be very painful. If you can be seen by a physician, they can take a sample and look under the microscope for the fungus. If not, an antifungal powder might be better suited to begin with initially, and then once the area is less irritated, you could use one of the antifungal creams. Additionally, note that if you have other conditions such as diabetes or other health issues, these can be difficult to clear up once they have gotten as severe as yours seems to be.
